text: Welcome to Sunshine English.
She is Grace. She is 35 years old. She
is still single. She loves her family a
lot. She is a good girl. She sacrificed
her happiness for her family. She is a
hardworking lady. She lost her parents
in a car accident. They are Grace's
grandmas. They love Grace a lot. Oh,
God. She is getting married. She is 25
years old. Our Grace is 35.
She is still single.
What? Who is getting married?
Mia is getting married. She lives in
this neighborhood. I am worried about
Grace.
She is 35 now. She has a lot of
responsibilities.
She does not think about herself.
Grace always think about her family. She
has a small jam factory. She does not
care about herself. She has a younger
sister and a brother. Good morning,
sister.
She is Grace's younger sister. She is
very stubborn.
Jane, your breakfast is ready. I made
your favorite omelette.
Really? Thank you so much. You are the
best, sister. I will see you in the
evening. You know I am on an internship.
Have a good day. I know my sister is
very intelligent.
You will learn some new skills.
You too. Thanks, sister.
She is Grace's younger brother.
Alex, you woke up late again. You are
getting late for college.
I am just going. Where is my sister? I
need some money.
I am here, Alex.
I will give you money. Come here.
Here you go, my handsome brother. You
have to study harder. Don't forget to
have your lunch on time.
Thank you so much, sister. You are the
best sister in the whole world. I have
to go now. Take care.
I have to go to work. Grandma, your tea
is ready. I have ironed your dress.
Don't forget to take your medicines on
time. I will call you soon.
Grace, you have plenty of time for us.
You don't have a minute for you. Have
you had your breakfast?
I will have my breakfast later.
You are my family. I love you a lot. I
am so lucky. I have two grandmas. You
are my dad's mom and she is my mom's
mother.
Grace,
please think about yourself. You
sacrifice a lot for us. I know you lost
your parents at your early age. You were
the elder sister. You had to take care
of your dad's factory.
You work hard for us.
We want to see you happy. Please live
your life. You have right to live your
life. You are also a human being. Mia is
getting married. She is just 26.
Please think about it.
I am happy in my life. Grandma, I don't
need anyone in my life. Please don't
talk about it. You are my family. I live
for you. Please take care.
I should go now.
What should we do now? She has to marry
now. She is getting old. She is 35 now.
I have to find a good boy for her. I
know her hearts is silent.
I will call Emily. She is a matchmaking
woman. She is our neighbor as well. She
can help us.
Yes, that's a great idea. She is a good
matchmaking woman. Call her now. She
will find a good boy for Grace.
Good morning, madam.
Good morning. Is everything okay?
Yes, everything is okay. You are a good
woman. God bless you.
Thanks. Get back to work.
My business is slow. I have to take care
of my factory. I have to sell more jams.
Oh, God help me. I hope my new client
will order a lot of jams.
Good morning, madam.
Good morning. I have a meeting with Mr.
Parker today.
No ma'am, he cannot come today. He
called me. He will come tomorrow. Okay,
you may go now. Listen, please bring me
the file. I need to check some details.
Okay, I will be right back.
She is Jenny. She is Grace's best
friend. She is her neighbor as well.
Hello. What's going on? Where is Grace?
We are fine. Jenny, you look slim. What
did you do?
Really? Actually, I am on a diet. I know
I am very beautiful in this
neighborhood.
You know, I lost one pound in a month. I
look like a model now.
Oh, that's great. That is the biggest
achievement.
Take care. I will come later. I am
looking for paying guest. You know, I
have a big house. I want to rent my
second portion.
Okay. Have a good day.
Oh, thank God. We were waiting for you.
Why did you call me? Are you looking for
a boy? I can find a perfect match. We
need your help. I want a good boy for
Grace. I will talk to Grace tonight. Can
you help me in this case?
What? Grace, she is 35 years old. I know
she does not want to marry. She rejected
two proposals before. It is not like
that. You know my grace. She is a good
girl. She wants a loyal husband. Those
proposals were selfish and greedy.
Please help us. We want to see Grace
happy. She does not think about herself.
She should marry now.
Fine. I know a good person. I will talk
to him. He will meet Grace. You have to
talk to Grace about it. He can come
tomorrow.
Really? Don't worry. We will talk to
Grace.
Good evening, Grace.
How was your day?
It was great as usual. Please pray for
my business. I have an important meeting
tomorrow. A client wants to order a lot
of jams. I am just thinking about my
business.
Please Grace, think about yourself. You
always think about business and us. You
should live your life. Everything will
be fine. I have talked to matchmaking
lady. You know her. She is our neighbor
again. I don't want to meet anyone. You
know me. I have you. I don't need
anyone. I have to work hard for my
sister and brother.
Grace, my sweetie. You always think
about us. We want to see you happy. You
have to marry. You need a good life
partner.
Please don't be so hard on yourself. You
have to meet him tomorrow.
He will come tomorrow.
I insist you.
I also want to see you happy.
Fine. If that makes you happy, I am
ready to meet him. I will listen to you.
My family is my world.
Really? Are you sure?
Yes, Grandma. I will meet that boy. Are
you happy now?
Yes, we are happy now.
Please don't go to work today. That boy
will come with his family today. He will
meet you. You have to meet that boy. You
promised us last night.
Yes. Please don't go. You should go to
the salon.
I have to go today. I have an important
meeting with a client. I promise you I
will come soon. Have a good day.
Jenny, what are you doing? What are
these?
I am distributing these flyers. I am
looking for a paying guest. I need a
handsome boy. He should be young and
intelligent.
Oh, come on, Jenny. You are very funny.
You need a tenant. It does not matter if
he is young and old. I must go now. Take
care.
Hang on a second, sister. Can you please
drop us off to the bus station?
Yeah, sure. Hurry up. I will drop you
off,
sister. Best of luck. A boy will come
with his parents to see you.
By the way, what kind of a boy do you
want?
Okay, I will tell you. He should be
mature.
A mature guy. Fine. What else?
He should be a calming nature.
coming nature. That's great. What else?
I want a man who respects me.
We got it. A mature guy, calming nature,
and who respects you.
Yes, your bus station is there.
He is Max. He is 25 years old. He is a
good person. Oh god, my car broke down.
What should I do now?
No problem. I need a lift. I have to ask
for help.
Please stop the car. Please give me a
lift in your car.
He did not stop for me. It's okay. I
will not give up.
Excuse me. I need your help. My car
broke down.
Nobody is stopping for me. What's going
on here? I will not give up.
Please help me. Can you please give me a
lift in your car?
I have to do something. One more car is
coming here. I have to stop that car.
Oh no. Please help me. Somebody help me.
Oh my god. Who are you? Are you okay?
What happened to you?
I am not okay. I think I am having a
heart attack. Please help me.
Oh god, this is really serious.
Don't worry. I will take you to the
hospital.
No, no, I don't want to go to the
hospital. I want to go home. Please take
me home. I want to see my mom. Please
help me.
No way. You are not okay. You should see
a doctor. I will take you to the
hospital.
Let's go. Can you stand up?
Yes, I am. Okay. Let me grab my bags
from my car.
Listen, we should go to the hospital. It
can be dangerous. I know you are not
okay.
No, I want to see my mom last time. She
is waiting for me. I will tell you the
directions.
Please help me. I don't want to go to
the hospital.
Oh god. Fine. I will take you home. You
look young. A heart attack at early age.
How is this possible?
Please drive fast. I am not feeling
well. I cannot talk right now.
Okay, you should rest. I will take you
home.
Why are you smiling? Are you okay? Are
you crazy?
I am perfectly fine. Thank you so much
for the lift. This is my destination.
What? You lied to me. You are fine. You
needed a lift. Why did you do this? How
immature.
I am fine. I am sorry again. I tried to
stop so many cars. Nobody helped me. I
had to do it. Sorry again. You may go
now.
I don't like immature guys. You should
not have done this. You wasted my time.
I have an important meeting today. I am
already late. I can lose my project.
Shame on you.
Everything will be fine. You helped me.
God will help you. Best of luck.
Unbelievable.
I have to go now. I hope I will never
meet you again.
Where is Mr. Parker?
He came here on time. He has been
waiting for you.
Don't worry. I will meet him.
I am sorry, Mr. Parker. I am late. I am
sorry again. Please have a seat. We can
talk now.
No way. I will not order anything now.
You made me wait. I have been waiting
for you for the last 30 minutes. You are
not punctual. You will not deliver my
order on time. I have to go now. I
cannot deal with you.
That's not true. I am very punctual. We
deliver our orders on time. You can
check our previous records online.
Oh, really? Then why were you late? What
is your excuse? A car broke down or a
traffic jam or someone was sick.
It did not happen like this. I will not
lie to you. It was not an emergency. I
just met a crazy person today. He made
me late. Please have a seat.
Oh, really? I like your honesty. I will
order now. We can talk. I will order
more jams. Thank you so much. I will not
let you down. We will deliver your order
on time.
I am so happy. Today we got a new
project. You will get your bonus as
well. It was a lucky day for me.
Really? Congratulations, ma'am. It is
good news for us. I will get back to
work.
Hello, Grandma.
Hello, Grace. Are you still in your
factory? Please come home soon. I told
you to come soon. That boy will come
soon with his family. You have to come
home now.
Don't worry, Grandma. I am just leaving.
I got a new project today. I will see
you soon. Take care.
Okay. Thank God. Come soon. Drive safe.
Excuse me.
